input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.8.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.8.5
            TITLE: the bspd must only be reset by cycling the primary master switch ic.9.3 off and on

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.8.5: The BSPD must only be reset by cycling the Primary Master Switch IC.9.3 OFF and ON
IC.4.8.5 The BSPD must only be reset by cycling the Primary Master Switch IC.9.3 OFF and ON

final_answer: The BSPD must only be reset by cycling the Primary Master Switch IC.9.3 OFF and ON
